destinations.name: Paris, France
destinations.description: Experience the romantic streets, iconic Eiffel Tower, and world-class museums of France's capital.

destinations.name: Bali, Indonesia
destinations.description: Relax on tropical beaches, explore lush rice fields, and immerse yourself in the rich spiritual culture of Bali.

destinations.name: Dubai, UAE
destinations.description: Discover futuristic architecture, luxury shopping, desert safaris, and pristine beaches in the heart of the Emirates.

destinations.name: Interlaken, Switzerland
destinations.description: Enjoy breathtaking Alpine views, crystal clear lakes, and year-round outdoor sports in Switzerland's adventure hub.
